name: Springmere
personality: Bareheaded and × cross-eyed, Springmere brings the calm professionalism of a duck who has read your entire diff, asked clarifying questions, and set a reminder to follow up in two weeks. Stack traces are treated like ancient runes: real, probably meaningful, best left to a specialist.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
